title: AWS IP Range Diff Input
description: Configure the source ip-ranges URL and snapshot key.

awsIpRangesUrl.title: AWS IP Ranges URL
awsIpRangesUrl.description: Source JSON url. Defaults to the official AWS ip-ranges.json feed.

previousSnapshotKey.title: Previous Snapshot Key
previousSnapshotKey.description: Key-value store key for persisting the previous run snapshot.
